infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: HoodOps needs camera access to capture job site photos and scan QR codes.
infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: HoodOps needs your location to verify job site check-ins.
infoPlist.NSLocationAlwaysAndWhenInUseUsageDescrip: HoodOps needs your location to track field routes and verify job site check-ins.
infoPlist.NSMicrophoneUsageDescription: HoodOps needs microphone access to record audio notes for job reports.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: HoodOps needs photo library access to attach existing photos to job reports.

plugins.cameraPermission: HoodOps needs camera access to capture job site photos and scan QR codes.

plugins.locationAlwaysAndWhenInUsePermission: HoodOps needs your location to verify job site check-ins and track field routes.
plugins.locationAlwaysPermission: HoodOps needs background location to track field routes.
plugins.locationWhenInUsePermission: HoodOps needs your location to verify job site check-ins.

plugins.microphonePermission: HoodOps needs microphone access to record audio notes for job reports.
